Home / Lore / Locations / The Pentagon

location

The Pentagon

The abandoned and storm-damaged military headquarters placed under siege by Black Tusk during Episode 2.

Connectionnot applicable Continuitydivision game universe Canon scopegame canon Verificationsource reviewed Reviewed2026-07-19

The Last Castle

Episode 2 presents the Pentagon as both a disaster-damaged institutional ruin and a store of technology that could shift the balance between Black Tusk and the Division. [1]

Claim ledger

Every factual statement below must retain at least one traceable source.

  1. confirmed

    The Pentagon is abandoned shortly after the Green Poison outbreak and subsequently damaged by floods and storms. [1]

  2. confirmed

    After the facility's lockdown, Black Tusk is the first outside force to enter and places the complex under siege. [1]

  3. confirmed

    The complex contains computational resources, underground DARPA laboratories and strategically valuable assets sought by Black Tusk. [1]

Sources

  1. [1] Intelligence Annex: The Pentagon & DARPA Research Labs — Ubisoft (2019-10-22). Accessed 2026-07-19.
Editorial status: Room-level evidence and environmental storytelling remain future records.

Unofficial, source-led research into The Division universe and its real-world influences.
